data.name: Acquiescence
data.description: Choose one creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become Drowzy for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the creature can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.
data.forHigherLevels: You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.
data.materialDescription: A pinch of fine sand,rose petals, or a cricket
